name: IC Investigation
description: Investigates IT incidents by analysing change logs, recent deployments, known issues, and incident history to identify root causes.

conversation_starters.title: Investigate an incident
conversation_starters.text: Investigate INC-2026-041 and identify the probable root cause

conversation_starters.title: Check recent changes
conversation_starters.text: Show me the change log for the last 24 hours

conversation_starters.title: Recent deployments
conversation_starters.text: What deployments happened in the last 6 hours?

conversation_starters.title: Known issues
conversation_starters.text: Are there any known issues that could explain the current auth service problems?
